title: Rising Star
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Rising Star''''' was the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] used by [[Nolaa Tarkona]] and [[Raabakyysh]] to escape from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Bounty]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
